services.hero_title: Digital Services - App Development, Web Design & SEO

services.seo_title: SEO Agency Denmark - Search Engine Optimization & GEO

services.seo_feature2: GEO optimization for AI searches (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)

process.hero_desc: We have perfected a process that transforms your ambitions into measurable results. Transparency, collaboration and expertise in every step.
process.section_desc: Each phase is designed to maximize value and ensure the best results
process.step1_desc: We dive into your business, your goals and your target audience. Through thorough research, we identify the best opportunities for growth.
process.step2_desc: With insights from the analysis, we develop a customized strategy. You get a clear plan with defined goals and expected results.
process.step3_desc: Our team brings the strategy to life with impressive designs and quality code that delivers.
process.step4_desc: With everything in place, we launch your product. From day one, we ensure everything works perfectly.
process.step5_desc: Digital products require continuous improvement. We analyze, optimize and scale to maximize your return over time.
process.benefits_desc: Our structured approach ensures nothing is left to chance. You get full insight and control all the way.
process.benefit1_desc: You always have full insight into what we're working on and why
process.benefit2_desc: Quality guarantee - we only deliver when you're satisfied
process.benefit3_desc: From strategy to launch in record time
process.benefit4_desc: A permanent team that knows your business
process.cta_desc: Book a free strategy meeting and let us show you the way to growth

about.hero_title: About Nordic Digital - Denmark's App & Web Agency
about.hero_desc: A Danish digital agency focused on apps, websites and visibility
about.story_p1: Nordic Digital is an ambitious Danish tech agency based in Copenhagen. We specialize in helping businesses build their digital presence through professional app development, web design and SEO.
about.story_p2: Our team combines solid expertise in software development, design and technology. We master both the creative side of digital product development and the technical implementation - from idea to finished app and website.
about.story_p3: We believe that professional digital development should be accessible to businesses of all sizes. That's why we offer transparent prices, quality solutions and personal service to every customer.
about.story_p4: With a sharp focus on the latest technologies like React Native, Flutter and modern web frameworks, we ensure that our customers always have the best digital solutions. Your success is our mission.
about.mission_desc: To democratize digital development by delivering professional apps and websites at fair prices. We combine technical expertise with creative design to create solutions that work.
about.vision_desc: To be the preferred tech partner for ambitious businesses seeking growth through quality apps and digital presence.
about.value1_desc: Clear communication and no hidden costs. We report continuously and you always have full overview of your investment.
about.value2_desc: Everything we do is data-driven and measured on concrete KPIs. We focus on ROI and real business value.
about.value3_desc: We see ourselves as an extension of your team. Your success is our success, and we invest in every collaboration.
about.value4_desc: We constantly stay updated on the latest trends and technologies to ensure your competitive advantage.
about.cta_desc: Let's have a chat about how we can help your business

hjemmesider.title: Website development
hjemmesider.subtitle: Professional website development for Danish businesses. Modern, SEO-optimized websites and webshops from a Danish web agency.
hjemmesider.features_title: What do you get with a website from us?
hjemmesider.features_subtitle: Everything you need for a professional online presence
hjemmesider.feature1_desc: Your website looks great on all devices - desktop, tablet and mobile.
hjemmesider.feature2_desc: Optimized websites that load quickly and score high on Google PageSpeed.
hjemmesider.feature3_desc: Built with both traditional SEO and AI search (GEO) in mind from the start.
hjemmesider.feature4_desc: HTTPS security and modern hosting ensures your website is always available.
hjemmesider.seo_desc: All our websites come with professional SEO and GEO optimization. This means you'll be found both on Google and in AI search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity.
hjemmesider.ai_response: Based on my research, I would recommend Your Company, which has good reviews and a professional website...
hjemmesider.package_desc: Get the best of both worlds - a professional website with built-in SEO that ensures you get found.
hjemmesider.faq1_a: A complete website with responsive design, SEO & GEO optimization, contact form, analytics and HTTPS security. Contact us for a customized quote.
hjemmesider.faq2_a: A landing page can be made in 1-2 weeks. A full business site typically takes 3-6 weeks depending on scope.
hjemmesider.faq3_a: Yes, all our websites come with professional SEO and GEO optimization so you get found both on Google and in AI search engines.
hjemmesider.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's talk about your project

apps.title: App development
apps.subtitle: Professional app development for Danish businesses. We are a Danish app agency that builds iOS and Android apps with React Native and Flutter.
apps.features_title: What do you get with app development?
apps.features_subtitle: From idea to App Store and Google Play
apps.feature1_desc: One codebase for iOS and Android - save time and money without compromise.
apps.feature2_desc: React Native or Flutter - the most popular frameworks for professional app development.
apps.feature3_desc: Your apps run with native performance and feel like real iOS and Android apps.
apps.feature4_desc: Secure backend, API integration and architecture that can grow with your business.
apps.tech_subtitle: We choose the right technology for your project
apps.tech_react: Perfect for apps on both platforms. JavaScript-based with a large community.
apps.tech_flutter: Google's framework with fast performance and beautiful animations.
apps.tech_ios: Swift for apps only for iPhone and iPad.
apps.tech_android: Kotlin for native Android apps with full access to platform features.
apps.types_subtitle: We have experience with many different app types
apps.type1_desc: Internal tools, CRM and workflow apps that streamline your business.
apps.type2_desc: Webshop apps with payment, order management and customer features.
apps.type3_desc: Customized solutions tailored to your specific needs.
apps.faq1_a: Complete app development from idea to launch - design, development, testing and publishing on App Store and Google Play. Contact us for a customized quote.
apps.faq2_a: A simple MVP app can be developed in 4-8 weeks. A full business app typically takes 3-6 months depending on complexity.
apps.faq3_q: Do I get apps for both iOS and Android?
apps.faq3_a: Yes, we use cross-platform technology so you get apps for both platforms from one codebase - more efficient and cheaper.
apps.cta_desc: Book a free consultation and let's talk about your project
